# Quickstart

This guide has merged into [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md), the single canonical installation guide.

What used to live here and where it went:

- Cloning Citadel and per-runtime install paths: [Manual Install](INSTALL.md#manual-install), with [Claude Code](INSTALL.md#claude-code) and [OpenAI Codex](INSTALL.md#openai-codex) sections
- Setup modes, what setup does, and first routed commands: [First Run](INSTALL.md#first-run)
- Verification and the per-project scaffold: [Verify](INSTALL.md#verify)
- Troubleshooting: [Troubleshooting](INSTALL.md#troubleshooting)
- Follow-on links and the Superpowers note: [Next Steps](INSTALL.md#next-steps)

For the copyable demo workflow, see [DEMO.md](DEMO.md).
